creator: jakub_lach@mailplus.pl
text:
(In reply to Tijl Coosemans from comment #10)

I have recompiled with this hack, and once again after latest src update - yet to experience any problems since.

The artifacts mentioned in this bug are something distinct and new for me, I have experienced various (other) artifacts over the years, though recently only if I was forcing "sna" (see https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla show_bug.cgi?id=249922).
